summary: Completed testing of 3 new features for Iteration 7: 1) Bulk Delete vulnerabilities, 2) Excel import auto-catalog creation, 3) Auditoría permissions in user settings. All backend tests passed (21/21). Frontend UI verified working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/import/excel - Auto-creates instituciones, aplicaciones, proveedores, informes
POST /api/import/excel - Case-insensitive matching for existing catalog items
POST /api/config/usuarios - Creates user with auditoria permission
PUT /api/config/usuarios/{id} - Updates user with auditoria permission
GET /api/historial - Returns audit log entries (admin only)
UI: Bulk action bar appears when selecting vulnerabilities
UI: 'Eliminar' button visible in bulk action bar
UI: Bulk delete confirmation dialog shows warning message
UI: Auditoría section visible in user permissions modal
UI: Auditoría 'Ver' checkbox available for non-admin users
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing (TEST_ prefixed items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 features fully tested: 1) Bulk delete endpoint at POST /api/vulnerabilidades/bulk-delete accepts {ids: []} and deletes multiple vulns with audit logging. 2) Excel import at POST /api/import/excel auto-creates missing catalog items (instituciones, aplicaciones, proveedores, informes) with case-insensitive matching. 3) Auditoría permissions section added to user modal in Usuarios.jsx with 'Ver' checkbox. Backend model UserPermissions does not include auditoria field but frontend sends it - this is acceptable as backend ignores extra fields. All 225 vulnerabilities in database, 2 users (admin, sfernandez).
